query:
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `accountAuditLogs` (
  `id` int AUTO_INCREMENT NOT NULL,
  `accountId` int NOT NULL,
  `operatorId` int,
  `operatorName` varchar(100),
  `action` varchar(50) NOT NULL,
  `changes` text,
  `notes` text,
  `createdAt` timestamp DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP NOT NULL,
  PRIMARY KEY (`id`),
  INDEX `account_id_idx` (`accountId`),
  INDEX `operator_id_idx` (`operatorId`),
  INDEX `action_idx` (`action`)
);

  `action` varchar(50) NOT NULL,
  `changes` text,
  `notes` text,

  PRIMARY KEY (`id`),
  INDEX `account_id_idx` (`accountId`),
  INDEX `operator_id_idx` (`operatorId`),
  INDEX `action_idx` (`action`)
